steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “in honor of its discoverer” reveals the implicit connection: Miyake's discovery leads to the phenomenon being named after her. The naming is presented as an appropriate, natural outcome.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer choices
steps.content:
Fittingly captures this as an appropriate, expected outcome.

The other choices either suggest a nonexistent parallel (Similarly), a nonexistent contradiction (However), or restatement rather than new information (In other words).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
